Plaintiff Citibank (South Dakota) N.A.'S Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar May-23-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Plaintiff Citibank (South Dakota) N.A.'S Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption.
The Claim of exemption is Granted in part. $2000 is to be released to the judgment debtor and the balance, $1,916.64, is to be released to the judgment creditor. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077

Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
